prompt: I have three PDF chapters: ./chapters/ch1.pdf (10 pages), ./chapters/ch2.pdf (8 pages), and ./chapters/ch3.pdf (12 pages). I need to: (1) merge them into a single book.pdf, including only pages 1-5 from chapter 1, all of chapter 2, and pages 3-10 from chapter 3, (2) then split the merged result into 5-page chunks in a directory called ./book-chunks/. Use the pdf-toolkit scripts for both operations.
